metadata.description: Quill Engine — discovery stub for AI agents. Actual workflow guides and prompt helpers ship inside the quill CLI (pip install quill) and are served by `quill skills get` / `quill ask`.

plugins.name: quill
plugins.description: Quill CLI for AI agents — semantic SQL over 22+ databases. Installs a single discovery stub that points the agent at the quill CLI for all workflow content.
